title: reiner2009's morningstar mod
description: This mod adds the weapon morningstar.
body:
⚔️ The Morningstar Mod – All Tool Variants Included!


Tired of using the same old swords and axes?

This mod introduces a brand-new weapon to Minecraft — the Morningstar! A brutal and stylish medieval weapon that packs a serious punch.


Every material that has tools (wood, stone, cooper, iron, gold, diamond, and netherite) now also has its own Morningstar variant. Whether you’re smashing mobs in the Overworld or taking on bosses in the Nether, the Morningstar gives you a fresh new way to fight. It is for Fabric 1.21.10. It's need Fabric API.

✨ Features \
✅ Fully functional Morningstars for every tool tier \
🛠️ Custom damage and attack speed balancing \
💎 Craftable just like regular tools — but heavier and deadlier! \
🧱 Great for medieval or fantasy-style gameplay
🔗 Decorativ Netherite Blocks — A few decorative powerful blocks



If you have ideas or feedback, feel free to share them!
